_note: selector = the stable ITS element id (UJ has no usable accessible names — see docs/phase-3/task-4-adapter-uj.md). Pages A and B live-verified end-to-end (fill + Save advance: A→B→C); Page C (Matric/Results) ids harvested 2026-06-05 (subject loop pending); pages D-G still pending (selector null). Page B: NOK needs only name+mobile (address/email hidden); the Account contact takes the full address (postal via LOV). DOB is a calendar field set via _set_date; town/province (addr lines 3/4) are typed; postal codes use the LOV search. `label` drives AI mapping; `selector` drives the adapter.

fields.label: Are you a SA Citizen in possession of a valid SA ID/Birth Certificate?
Citizenship Code
fields.help_text: ITS LOV popup (gw1lovbind) — full country list loads; click the row by name. Verified live 2026-06-05 ('South Africa').

fields.label: Gender
fields.help_text: auto-derived from the SA ID number in ITS — usually hidden/read-only, so the adapter skips it if not actionable

fields.label: Date of birth (DD-MON-YYYY)
fields.help_text: format DD-MON-YYYY, e.g. 12-MAR-2008

fields.label: Home language
fields.help_text: option list truncated in capture — confirm full list live

fields.label: How do you intend paying for your studies?
fields.help_text: conditionally shown — appears after earlier fields; ordering [VERIFY LIVE]

fields.label: Postal Code
fields.help_text: ITS LOV popup; searching the raw code ('0152') returned no results — filter format [VERIFY LIVE]

fields.label: Do you have a South African Cell Phone Number?
fields.help_text: conditionally shown; ordering [VERIFY LIVE]

fields.label: Do you want to apply for residence?
Do you have a disability or impairment?
Next of kin's mobile/cellular phone number
fields.help_text: NOK needs only name + mobile; the NOK address/email fields are hidden (not required).

fields.label: Account Contact's name(s) (person responsible for payments)
Matric/Grade 12 Year (YYYY)
fields.help_text: fill FIRST — its onchange eventRun(5.4) reveals the rest of Page C (the hidden UGDiv block)

fields.label: Are you applying for Undergraduate or Post-graduate?
fields.help_text: after matric year, the choice control #oapUGPG hides and this UG-only select (pre-set to Undergraduate) is shown instead

fields.label: Are you upgrading your Gr 12 results?
Are you completing/completed a SA or International Matric
fields.help_text: selecting the endorsement LOV below silently resets this to the placeholder, so the adapter re-asserts it before adding subjects (verified live 2026-06-06)

fields.label: Indicate your endorsement from your school leaving certificate
fields.help_text: value 'CURRENTLY IN GR.12' for a current Gr12 applicant; gates (reveals) the subject-capture LOVs

fields.label: School leaving subjects (repeating: per subject pick Subject + Grade(NSC) + Gr11 percentage via LOVs, then click Add Subject)

subject.help_text: subject names are qualifier-tagged, e.g. 'MATHEMATICS (NSC/NCV/ISC)', 'ENGLISH HOME LANG. (NSC/NCV)', 'LIFE ORIENTATION (NSC/NCV/DR)'

percentage.help_text: Gr11 final percentage — the 'symbol' field actually holds percentages (0-99); #oapmarkGr11 is mandatory=N and skipped

fields.help_text: verified live 2026-06-06: per subject pick subject+grade(NSC)+Gr11 percentage via LOVs then click #oapAddMatric; rows accumulate. Save = #oapNextBtn3

fields.label: Which school did you attend last
fields.help_text: full SA school list; search e.g. 'SOSHANGUVE' -> 'SOSHANGUVE SECONDARY SCHOOL'

fields.label: What are you currently doing?
fields.help_text: single option 'GRADE 12 PUPIL' for current matriculants

fields.label: Have you studied at another institution previously?
fields.help_text: 'No' for school leavers. Save = #oapNextBtn4

fields.label: Are you applying for:
fields.help_text: GATES the faculty LOV — set to 'Curricular Courses' for a degree applicant or the faculty list returns 'no data'

fields.label: Limit your selection to a specific Faculty / College
fields.help_text: e.g. 'ENGINEERING&BUILT ENVIRONMENT' (no 'FACULTY OF' prefix); only populates after applying_for is set

fields.label: Choose a programme
fields.help_text: code-keyed LOV: row link text is a code (e.g. B6CS0Q); the readable name + '(ELIGIBLE TO APPLY-Y/N)' tag are in the description cell — pick by row text via select_from_lov_row. UJ allows 2 programme choices (oapAddQual).

fields.label: For which year of study are you applying?
fields.help_text: e.g. 'FIRST YEAR'

fields.label: How would you like to study for this programme?
fields.help_text: auto-populates from the programme (e.g. 'APK CAMPUS FULL-TIME'); #oapBlock ('YEAR BLOCK') auto-populates too. Save = #oapNextBtn6
